return(function(G,g,o,a,e,Q,R,m,c,p,s,K,i,M,n,j,H,S,w,X,T,O,A,V,I,B)T,i,m,j,c,w,V,p,K,s,B,M,A,O,I,X,n,H,S=function(G,t)local g=s(t)local o=function(...)return m(G,{...},t,g)end return o
